h2: See-through gas fireplaces are the perfect way to connect your spaces, room to room or outdoor to indoor. Browse our double-sided fireplaces and enjoy ambiance from any angle with a beautiful fire at the center.
The Best of Both Worlds: Indoor-Outdoor Fireplaces
7 Indoor-Outdoor Rooms We’d Love to Live In

paragraphs: See-through gas fireplaces are the perfect way to connect your spaces, room to room or outdoor to indoor. Browse our double-sided fireplaces and enjoy ambiance from any angle with a beautiful fire at the center.

Enjoy the fire yearlong, from either side. Venting in the Twilight see-through indoor/outdoor fireplace gives you freedom in designing two spaces, including windows above the fire to expand fireside views.

Make your home your castle. From patio to living room, savor the same beautiful fire with the Fortress see-through gas fireplace. It is built of stainless steel and sealed to blend outdoor and indoor relaxation.
The first indoor/outdoor gas fireplace trends ahead with the Twilight Modern see-through model. Artistic flames rise through crushed glass with no chimney or venting needed in a contemporary design.
Unify your space even if you do not have much space—or budget. The 36" see-through gas fireplace delivers Heat & Glo quality in a myriad of styles to create a unique and inviting presence.

Add the atmosphere of fire into your room in a new way. The Corner Two-Sided gas fireplace brings an unused space to life, either left- or right-facing. It is a novel way to visual punch to tighter spaces.

Think big, deliver bigger in a fireside experience you can walk around. The Pier three-sided gas fireplace partitions your space or anchors multiple rooms in authentic or modern styling with fire from three views.

Think outside the box, inside your space. The Mezzo Double-Sided fireplace provides one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by dynamic, end-to-end ribbon flames. Choose from seven fire bed materials and two log sets to create a stunning interior room divider. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

In a clean transitional look, draw people and your interior together. The Escape See-Through fireplace stands out with its huge opening and bold flames, adding architectural interest to multiple rooms.

Elevate two spaces at once. Whether an interior room divider or a beautiful bridge for indoor-outdoor living, the Primo II gas linear fireplace is a stunning addition. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace, with mere inches in between. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.
Designer Brandi Hagen creates a timeless home that felt lived in from the start, leveraging six gas fireplaces to let each space exude its own personality.
Bring warmth and beauty to your indoor and outdoor spaces with one fireplace.
Merging indoor and outdoor spaces allows you to extend your living space beyond the typical boundaries.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.

Pier / 3-sided firelace with log set in contemporary space with living room and dining room separated by fireplace wall.
Heat & Glo Mezzo See-Through AU 48" linear gas fireplace on stone wall over bathtub with TV above.
Heat & Glo Escape See-Through gas fireplace in stone wall with wood mantel and TV overhead in living room.
Spacious modern minimalist room with white walkaround partition wall featuring see-through linear gas fireplace.
Different mantels or surround sets can be used to achieve different looks on one side of the wall from the other when using a see-through fireplace.
